title: Sports
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: 2026 NFL Free Agency: One Ideal Signing for All 32 Teams
items.description: Who should every team sign in NFL free agency? We try to find the best fit for each.

items.title: Elimination of April Transfer Window Causing Return of Spring Football Games?
items.description: The disappearance of the spring transfer portal window offers the opportunity for a reappearance of spring football games across the country.

items.description: Geoff Schwartz is here with his first mock for the 2026 NFL Draft. Here's where he projects QBs Fernando Mendoza and Ty Simpson will land.

items.title: Cleetus McFarland Surprised Kevin Harvick With His Next Move in NASCAR
items.description: Cleetus McFarland is taking the next step in his NASCAR career, he explained to Kevin Harvick on "SPEED."

items.description: The latest news, announcements and updates ahead of the 2026 World Baseball Classic.

items.title: Bills trading for Bears WR Moore, sources say
items.description: The Bears have agreed to a trade to send wide receiver DJ Moore to the Bills, sources told ESPN's Adam Schefter.

items.title: UNC star Wilson still not cleared for Duke return

items.title: ⚾ MLB Rank: Ranking baseball's top 100 players
items.description: From star sluggers like Ohtani and Judge to top pitchers like Skubal, we rank -- and make predictions for -- the best players in baseball right now.

items.title: Sources: Saints sack king Jordan to be free agent
items.description: Saints defensive end Cameron Jordan will become a free agent when the new league begins next week, sources told ESPN's Adam Schefter.
